creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 158737
port's patch

Hi!
We have a patch in www/squid for bug #4190 (file/patch-bug4190).
For description see http://bugs.squid-cache.org/show_bug.cgi?id=4190

This patch was made by me, because squid used to be unusable in several cases. So I just made a patch which reverts the problem change.

Now bug #4190 got an official (temporary?) patch, which was suggested here http://bugs.squid-cache.org/show_bug.cgi?id=4227
and then approved http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v3/3.5/changesets/

Let's replace my ugly patch with official patch =)
